title: patricia highsmith feeds salt to her pet snails
description:
She mistakes packets of salt for Snail Chow.

FYI: This was what I originally planned the title to be. Therefore, the different name. The first title was kind of just to make fun of and coincide with a certain overhyped single release.

CARROT
